field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: The critical conditions have been identified in some single eluents which are thermodynamicaly poor solvents for polymers investigated, namely, acetonitrile for PMMA at 66 °C and dimethylformamide for PnBMA at 154 °C and for PS at 95 °C with C18 bonded silica gel.
field_evidence.critical_component: The critical conditions have been identified in some single eluents which are thermodynamicaly poor solvents for polymers investigated, namely, acetonitrile for PMMA at 66 °C and dimethylformamide for PnBMA at 154 °C and for PS at 95 °C with C18 bonded silica gel.
field_evidence.column_name: a 250 × 6 mm column contained silica gel bonded with C18 phase, 5 μm, 30 nm, Nucleosil C18 LS ST (Macherey-Nagel, Düren, Germany)
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: The critical conditions have been identified in some single eluents which are thermodynamicaly poor solvents for polymers investigated, namely, acetonitrile for PMMA at 66 °C and dimethylformamide for PnBMA at 154 °C and for PS at 95 °C with C18 bonded silica gel.
